pi_items.source: setup_task.sh dynamically creates the specification text file at this path.
export_result.sh exports and checks for the existence of the GMAT script at this exact path.
export_result.sh greps values directly from this expected report path.
setup_task.sh specification explicitly sets the target latitude to 40.0 deg, and verifier.py checks against 40.0.
setup_task.sh specification explicitly sets the target longitude to -75.0 deg, and verifier.py checks against -75.0.
verifier.py statically utilizes 0.05 tolerance for latitude evaluations.
setup_task.sh prompts the 0.05 tolerance, and verifier.py enforces it for longitude.
verifier.py enforces a maximum delta-v constraint of 50.0 m/s for full points.

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on synthetically generated specification data for a Philadelphia overflight, injected directly into the workspace via setup_task.sh. It has been verified that the expected output paths (sar_targeting.script and overflight_report.txt) correctly align with the validation script checks. The target geography parameters (Latitude 40.0, Longitude -75.0), targeting tolerances (0.05 deg), and a maximal valid delta-v constraint (50.0 m/s) match perfectly between the task description instructions and the scoring logic in verifier.py.
